description: STROMDAO GmbH is a German company focused on digital energy infrastructure, consulting, market communication, network management, data APIs, and AI-supported platforms for the energy sector. The stromdao.de website presents company information, services, and knowledge pages, and links out to separate ecosystem products for developer APIs.
summary: stromdao.de itself exposes no developer-callable API/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface; the site only points developers to external ecosystem properties such as corrently.io and gruenstromindex.de for API access.
